title: Luminous No Shading
description: No shading for world and inventory forms of luminous objects.
body:
**Luminous No Shading** is a Minecraft mod that makes luminous light-emitting blocks and entities to render more brighter comparable to how it renders on [Minecraft: Bedrock Edition](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Bedrock_Edition).

## Features

Luminous No Shading removes [directional shading](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Shading) for the following:

* Light-emitting blocks and their item forms (e.g. [Enchanting Table](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Enchanting_Table) and [End Portal Frame](https://minecraft.wiki/w/End_Portal_Frame))
* Vanilla block entities and their item forms (e.g. [Conduit](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Conduit))
* [Blaze](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Blaze), [Magma Cube](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Magma_Cube), [Glow Squid](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Glow_Squid)

Luminous No Shading will also render items at their default light level, making them brighter even on dark environments.

<hr>

Luminous No Shading with [Simply No Shading#120](https://github.com/StartsMercury/simply-no-shading/issues/120), an enhancement issue to bring Bedrock Edition-like shading for light-emitting blocks in the inventory, and is now a separate mod and changes the ones in the world as well.
